This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.

The Judge Pro Tem Roger Ruben, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 305-B.

The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for settlement and entry of Judgment", which was /// NOT filed.

Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.

This case did NOT settle, TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
